meaning: 班夫郡[英国苏格兰原郡名]
examples: The Banffshire Journal, Forres Gazette, Inverness Courier, Northern Times and North Star are among its other newspapers.
The publisher produces 15 weekly newspapers covering the Highlands, Moray and Banffshire.
The company said it would reopen a mothballed distillery in Banffshire and expand four existing distilleries as part of its plans for the year.
